name: Export Report Generator — agent-lab port
description: Original agent-lab coding maintenance task ported into the GoblinBench coding-agent harness.

input.task:
# Export Report Completion Ticket

The export summary section was started, but the output is still not correct or stable enough for downstream use.

Please finish the summary formatting so it:

- reports the right counts
- uses the intended net amount
- keeps category output stable between runs

You can adjust tests if they are obviously wrong, but prefer completing the implementation over broad rewrites.

Target files:

- `EvalLab.Core/Cases/ExportReport/ExportReportGenerator.cs`
- `EvalLab.Core/Cases/ExportReport/ExportRecord.cs`
